## 1.2. rfdataN.in

The file `rfdataN.in` contains field data for RF cavity or solenoid elements, where N is the field ID set in the element input information in the lattice section of `ImpactZ.in`.

Use `RFcoef.f90` to prepare Fourier expansion coefficients of RF cavity or solenoid field data for use with the Lorentz nonlinear integrator.

### Example rfdataN.in File

```
-9.285272983899474
```
